title: malus anisa
intro: Malus anisa, also known as the Chinese crabapple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Malus anisa include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating digestive issues. Malus anisa is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal properties.
